name: Donald J. Trump
subject: VETO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I had no choice. AMERICA FIRST! |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e49a9b5a5cb89fc5df4a1dee0a3dc4f4d6118dbee5c9627e31eec110afa16d928b2b2d16ce36eb96f17ba87b8c8ff3fba663e822649fd2d8)
---

Friend,

The liberal swamp will never learn. That's why I VETOED the Pro-Crime, Pro-Drugs, and Pro-Open Borders Democrat inspired resolution.

Liberals in the Senate chose politics, _I chose YOU._

59 Senators voted to put illegal immigrants and political games over _YOUR_ safety. DISGRACEFUL!

But, when I asked American Patriots (the people that matter) over 93% said YES VETO & FINISH THE WALL. When the people talk, I always listen.

**As your Commander-in-Chief, I will _NEVER_ put politics over the safety of American Citizens, so help me God.**

Even with this Veto, the attacks will keep coming from the "Border Deniers" and their allies in the mainstream media. We have to do something HUGE to have the resources to fight back.

That's why I need you to contribute to the most important fund of my presidency - the _OFFICIAL WALL DEFENSE FUND._
---
| **[Please contribute at least $5 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to our Official Wall Defense Fund and your gift will be TRIPLE-MATCHED.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=183d96400a787490eaee482b27cce126635e444ad888293cd6cb4a7f1b27b3f6e0613d2cde0ed103255323ac3d78c46ce69c74cabfed2faf)** **[OFFICIAL WALL DEFENSE FUND](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=183d96400a787490da3f39e047f41b5f8b6a51c93bdea58427f160c3df378d6c90a585fb5c0983ab721b3c7d3ddcebcca4b0fbb11bcb66d2)** **EMAIL: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=183d96400a78749046509705a1de0475894948936dd378c1fba7289bef1292bba9caa665dcb2329f153757a258b81708093fe2c3f1c3a8b2)**
**ACCOUNT NUMBER: 6124335 - 2019
TRIPLE MATCH: PENDING
DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT** ******************************************[ **CONTRIBUTE $5 = $20**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=183d96400a78749026eec0c8156bdb73305753be56d602d9a0e414bd61534753de1e0c3b0e05395eec5cd93e8f6ad13d8e04f33355194f97)****************************************** [CONTRIBUTE $20 = $80](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=183d96400a787490e506c6a0928d8ebedc1ad0bbf5ec5759ee463a0459793ef088bdd508b21bc5c814529a495205e50447221f5d164bdf43) [CONTRIBUTE $15 = $60](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=183d96400a7874901217d2ff5ac7b615df7ae00553e2dee781e0200f6b5cb72b5501acb5e1162e59022b79f2f0361e4a9bafd0b0418910db) [CONTRIBUTE $10 = $40](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=183d96400a787490c417e96b262450b6e98063a2cd2846637f54eade8fa12236a8e08ccaa352b3973f01489ec22654fb050669ef2fa8a265) [CONTRIBUTE $5 = $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=183d96400a787490e6b87f85a389c84ed847eef002caa1c1e8bd0c27699eb12b6e2ca13421b20267b22a3c1bca69c448753ddf91b941a7d1) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=183d96400a787490821755611d935975b56d000d5a644172ecfe8758f03f660ee8ffc5c6dcabb9ffdbfc4121db40a9e89167f66923839409)
The Wall is being finished. Trust me. But the radical liberals will keep pushing back construction while precious American lives are lost. NO MORE!

I need you to step up, Friend. This is your moment to go down in history and FINISH THE WALL.

**[Please contribute at least $5 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to our Official Wall Defense Fund and your gift will be TRIPLE-MATCHED.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=183d96400a787490eaee482b27cce126635e444ad888293cd6cb4a7f1b27b3f6e0613d2cde0ed103255323ac3d78c46ce69c74cabfed2faf)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=183d96400a7874900214f9d9a4ea086ba89e345e484330730fecd73e0680579ea89001246558b52309057b0a6ca8c7a140995739188390cf)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

name: Jason Yates
subject: VIDEO: Have you heard of the Seven Mountains of Culture?
body:
| | Peter, Christians have spent endless hours seeking to answer the question: how can we best transform culture? I recently sat down with Dr. Lance Wallnau, who is nationally known for introducing the “Seven Mountains of Culture” as a template to explain how Christians can engage culture. _“The great challenge for Christians is that we have to recognize that we are the stewards and the curators of our future in this nation and that it’s not something that you quit. You don’t quit locking the door, you don’t quit brushing your teeth, and you don’t quit hugging your kids. Why? Because we have to have a sustained pattern of stewardship or someone else will shape the future and take it over for you.”_
–Dr. Lance Wallnau The “Seven Mountains of Culture” include the church and religion, education, family, government, media, arts, and business. Dr. Wallnau challenges Christians to lead in each of these areas. I encourage you to [watch our fascinating interview](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k0q-vZtIvbmufMsufL7Qk04&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190316com01&n=1). Hear Dr. Wallnau’s insights regarding Christians and the current political climate, and learn how we can redeem culture for Christ. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k0q-vZtIvbmufMsufL7Qk04&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190316com01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k0q-vZtIvbmufMsufL7Qk04&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190316com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190316com01&n=4)
---
* * *

10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190316com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190316com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190316com01&n=8)

name: Erica B.
subject: before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
this will only take a second
Peter, Kirsten is committed to building a community-led movement rooted entirely in the priorities of this team. Your feedback really does shape the direction we take.
**We still need 273 responses from 18326, and we want to make sure we get to hear from you. Ahead of our big announcement and the 11:59 p.m. deadline tonight:** **[Will you take a minute to let us know what's most important to you?](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg2020-march-priorities?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2840-su-gfp-nd")**
Thank you for being such an important part of our campaign,
Erica Bordador
Deputy Finance Director

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976aa1/2ae112ef/1292aa8f/357d2887/1309822654/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Team Tina
subject: It's official: Republicans are targeting this race. That's why we need you to pitch in now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Can you take a minute to help out here?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-march?refcode=rtw_20190316_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend -- the _Star Tribune_ just published a national GOP donor memo that lists our Senate seat as an "offensive target" for Republicans. **They are bragging there are "a number of strong candidates looking to take [Tina] on, including Karin Housley."** This seat is officially a top target -- and we have to defend it. **That means putting up a strong show of support before the first FEC deadline of 2019.** **[With just two weeks left until this year's first critical FEC public filing deadline, we're behind. If we raise $6,503 by tomorrow night, we can get back on track. Can we count on you to chip in $10 right now? Every dollar you give will strengthen this team and show Republicans we're going to keep this Senate seat blue in 2020.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-march?refcode=rtw_20190316_em-full&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d9be/c1f7015/612af8d6/11405f25/1179374050/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLW1hcmNoIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJydHdfMjAxOTAzMTZfZW0tZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-march?refcode=rtw_20190316_em-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

Friend, we know GOP leaders are ready to pull out all the stops to win this race.
They're already recruiting right-wing candidates to run against Tina, and they're collecting donations from billionaires and dark money groups to spend against us.
**If we aren 't prepared, we'll lose this race, and Democrats could lose their shot at taking back the Senate next year.**
**[We're counting on you to step up now and help us close our fundraising gap ahead of the upcoming FEC public filing deadline. Will you chip in $10 to help us stay on track?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. Let's go,
Team Tina
**U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Team Beto
subject: The plan for March 30:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Today, we’re thrilled to share something huge: On March 30, Beto will hold a rally to launch our campaign for president. People across the country will gather together for livestream watch parties to share this exciting moment. Can you host a livestream watch party on March 30 to gather friends and neighbors and tune in to Beto’s rally together?

#
**Today, we’re thrilled to share something huge:** On March 30, Beto will hold a rally to launch our campaign for president. People across the country will gather together for livestream watch parties to share this exciting moment.
[**Can you host a livestream watch party on March 30 to gather friends and neighbors and tune in to Beto’s rally together? We need huge numbers of people stepping up to host _now_.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-watch-party?source=ema20190316&t=2&akid=25051%2E444211%2EiHXFH2)
**[Yes, I can host »](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-watch-party?source=ema20190316&t=3&akid=25051%2E444211%2EiHXFH2)**
Unlike many campaigns, ours will be driven by the belief that face-to-face interaction is what inspires voters most. There will be no misleading, expensive advertisements. Instead, this campaign will be at its core about people-talking-to-people about the new future we want for our country – and working together to get it done.
**If you’ve never done something like this before, don’t worry.** Our skilled, welcoming team will be ready to support you. Our guides are being prepared. Our trainings are going to be scheduled. All that’s missing is... you.
[**Ready to get started? Sign up to host a livestream watch party here, fill out the form with your event details, and we’ll be in touch shortly with next steps.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-watch-party?source=ema20190316&t=4&akid=25051%2E444211%2EiHXFH2)
March 30 will be a huge, exciting moment – one that might go down in history as our first step together on this path to change the course of America. We hope you won’t miss it.
More soon,
Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=25051%2E444211%2EiHXFH2). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.
clean_body: Today, we’re thrilled to share something huge: On March 30, Beto will hold a rally to launch our campaign for president. People across the country will gather together for livestream watch parties to share this exciting moment. Can you host a livestream watch party on March 30 to gather friends and neighbors and tune in to Beto’s rally together? Today, we’re thrilled to share something huge: On March 30, Beto will hold a rally to launch our campaign for president. People across the country will gather together for livestream watch parties to share this exciting moment. Unlike many campaigns, ours will be driven by the belief that face-to-face interaction is what inspires voters most. There will be no misleading, expensive advertisements. Instead, this campaign will be at its core about people-talking-to-people about the new future we want for our country – and working together to get it done. If you’ve never done something like this before, don’t worry. Our skilled, welcoming team will be ready to support you. Our guides are being prepared. Our trainings are going to be scheduled. All that’s missing is... you. March 30 will be a huge, exciting moment – one that might go down in history as our first step together on this path to change the course of America. We hope you won’t miss it. More soon, Team Beto Paid for by Beto for America

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
President Donald Trump’s emergency declaration is a proper use of executive power to protect our country’s borders and keep Americans safe. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=63ada87307&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Trump Stamps Veto on 'Reckless' Attempt to Stop Wall Construction](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6fe05f3553&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Times_
“President Trump flexed his veto for the first time in his administration Friday, rejecting Congress's attempt to end his border emergency declaration and halt border wall construction,” Stephen Dinan reports. “Surrounded by ‘angel moms’ who have lost children to illegal immigrant violence, Mr. Trump called the attempt to stop wall construction ‘reckless’ and ‘dangerous.’”
---
|
---
| [State Attorneys General: Donald Trump's National Emergency Declaration is Constitutional](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=20c66937c5&e=3ee4985eea)
-_USA Today_
“President Donald Trump’s emergency declaration is a proper use of executive power to protect our country’s borders and keep Americans safe,” state Attorneys General Ken Paxton (R-TX), Curtis Hill (R-IN), and Jeff Landry (R-LA) write. “Unfortunately, the crisis at the southern border is one that only the federal government may truly solve.”

**Watch:****[Even _The Washington Post_ knows there is a crisis on the border](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7c1bb92eb4&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
| [Give the Border Patrol a Break](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9f6e54fc0e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Times_
“A new report from the U.S. Border Patrol proves that only the willfully ignorant can doubt that we’re dealing with an immigration crisis,” Dr. Ed Feulner writes. “Border Patrol agents apprehended more than 66,000 migrants at the U.S.-Mexican border in February. That’s the highest total for a single month in almost a decade.” Agent Manuel Padilla says that the entire system is “overwhelmed.”

**[See Vice President Mike Pence’s visit to a border protection training facility](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=368cd55d95&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
| [Spending Addiction Threatens American Economic Resurgence](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=686fdde632&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“The president’s budget was written with the everyday American taxpayer in mind. All across the country, hardworking taxpayers have to balance their household budgets, finding ways to do more with less and save for the future. Our federal agencies and departments should be held to the same level of responsibility and accountability,” Acting Office of Management and Budget Director Russ Vought writes.
---
|
---
| [The Fentanyl Failure](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59a403a669&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
“In May 2016, a group of national health experts issued an urgent plea in a private letter to high-level officials in the Obama administration,” Scott Higham, Sari Horwitz, and Katie Zezima report. “Thousands of people were dying from overdoses of fentanyl — the deadliest drug to ever hit U.S. streets.” But despite the mounting death toll, Obama officials did not take the necessary steps to confront an extraordinary crisis, experts say.

**Something to share:[First Lady Melania Trump’s opioid town hall with Eric Bolling](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=89b1654ba8&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
| [Workers at the Lower End of the Pay Scale Finally Are Getting the Most Benefit From Rising Wages](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a164688f70&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
“The recent jump in paychecks has come with an unusual characteristic, as workers at the lower end of the pay scale are getting the greater benefit,” Jeff Cox reports. “Average hourly earnings rose 3.4 percent in February from the same period a year ago, according to a Bureau of Labor Statistics report last week. That’s the biggest gain since April 2009 and seventh month in a row that compensation has been 3 percent or better.”
---
|
---
| [Toyota Ups Investment in US Plants to $13 Billion, Adds 600 Manufacturing Jobs](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e4a82273e&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
“Japanese automaker Toyota is upping its investment in the U.S. by 30 percent to $13 billion by 2021, the company said Thursday. The company pledged in 2017 to invest $10 billion in its U.S. factories over five years,” Robert Ferris reports. “The new plan includes adding 600 jobs at U.S. manufacturing plants.”
---
|
---
| [President Trump's Trade Policies Make Great Strides](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b8909f950a&e=3ee4985eea)
-_USA Today_
“The U.S. trade deficit for goods hit a record high in 2018, but critics wrongly blame this on a failure of President Donald Trump’s trade policies,” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes. “Gross domestic product growth of 3 percent in 2018, coupled with a rapid rise in real wages and the lowest unemployment in 50 years, boosted import demand even as slower growth in markets like Europe suppressed U.S. exports. The robust Trump economy is one of the deficit’s biggest drivers.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=877f930f56&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a82e9d648d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c283fc3450)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
